nasb.text: Then he left them with the king of Moab; and they stayed with him all the time that David was in the stronghold.

esv.text: And he left them with the king of Moab, and they stayed with him all the time that David was in the stronghold.

cnv.text: 於是大衛把他們留在摩押王那裡。大衛住在山寨的日子有多久，他父母也與摩押王同住多久。

ccb.text: 大卫把父母留在了摩押王那里。在大卫住堡垒期间，他的父母一直住在摩押。
